properties.name: ntfy.enabled
properties.description: Whether the ntfy integration is active. When true, the Logback appender is installed and the NtfyClient bean is created.

properties.name: ntfy.url
properties.description: Base URL of the ntfy server (e.g. https://ntfy.sh). Required for the appender to be installed.

properties.name: ntfy.topic
properties.description: ntfy topic that notifications are published to. Required for the appender to be installed.

properties.name: ntfy.token
properties.description: Bearer access token used for ntfy authentication (takes precedence over username/password).

properties.name: ntfy.username
properties.description: Username for ntfy HTTP basic authentication.

properties.name: ntfy.password
properties.description: Password for ntfy HTTP basic authentication.

properties.name: ntfy.title
properties.description: Static notification title. When unset a title is derived from the log event.

properties.name: ntfy.app-name
properties.description: Application name included in notifications to identify the source.

properties.name: ntfy.max-stack-frames
properties.description: Maximum number of stack-trace frames included in a notification body.

properties.name: ntfy.connect-timeout
properties.description: HTTP connect timeout for publishing to ntfy.

properties.name: ntfy.request-timeout
properties.description: HTTP request timeout for publishing to ntfy.

properties.name: ntfy.max-alerts-per-window
properties.description: Maximum number of alerts published within a suppression window before rate limiting kicks in.

properties.name: ntfy.suppression-window
properties.description: Rolling window used for rate limiting and digesting suppressed alerts.

properties.name: ntfy.error-priority
properties.description: ntfy priority applied to individual ERROR notifications.

properties.name: ntfy.digest-priority
properties.description: ntfy priority applied to digest notifications summarizing suppressed alerts.

properties.name: ntfy.error-tags
properties.description: Comma-separated ntfy tags applied to individual ERROR notifications.

properties.name: ntfy.digest-tags
properties.description: Comma-separated ntfy tags applied to digest notifications.

properties.name: ntfy.excluded-loggers
properties.description: Comma-separated list of logger names or prefixes whose events are never published.

properties.name: ntfy.require-https-for-credentials
properties.description: Strict mode: refuse to activate alerting (instead of only warning) when credentials would be sent over a plain http:// endpoint.
